info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

tags.name: Google Ad Library
tags.description: Scrape the Google Ad Transparency Library. *This only gets the public ads. Some ads you need to log in for and sadly we can't get those. Also, since there are so many variations, the return types might not all be 100% the same. Email me for suggestions. Also this endpoint is pretty new, if you find any errors or irregularities, please email me: support@scrapecreators.com

get.description: Get the ads for a company. *This only gets the public ads. Some ads you need to log in for and sadly we can't get those. Starting November 10th 2025, you will need to add get_ad_details=true to get the ad details (and will cost 25 credits). If you don't add that, only the advertiserId and creativeId from each ad will be returned (and will continue to cost just 1 credit)

parameters.name: advertiser_id
parameters.description: The advertiser id of the company

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: The topic to search for. If you search for 'political', you will also need to pass a 'region', like 'US' or 'AU'

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: The region to search for. Defaults to anywhere

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date to search for. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date to search for. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: get_ad_details
parameters.description: Set to true to get the ad details. Will cost 25 credits.
